# UX Checklist: Standardize POI categories across sources

**Purpose**: Validate maintainer UI for standardization runs, mapping quality, and failures.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/020-standardize-poi-categories/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Run Visibility

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Run list shows status, trigger type, taxonomy/mapping versions, and timestamps.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Mapping quality metrics (mapped/unmapped/conflicts) are visible per run.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Mapping quality details (conflicting labels, unmapped labels with counts) are visible in run details.

## Failure & Warnings

- [x] CHK-UX-004 UI shows actionable failure details for governance threshold failures or promotion failures.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 UI clarifies that production standardized categories remain unchanged after failures.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-006 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("POI standardization", "Mapping quality", "Conflicts", "Promotion").
- [x] CHK-UX-007 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
